title: Repeat Offender Arrested in Charlotte Stabbing of Pregnant Woman
summary: A woman with a criminal history was arrested two weeks after stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the issue of repeat offenders and the vulnerability of pregnant women to violent crime.

title: Repeat Offender Accused in Harris Teeter Stabbing
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte parking lot. She has nine prior convictions.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the need for effective measures to manage and rehabilitate repeat offenders.
